subject: Rebuilt WHEN page (page_4) + docs/ROADMAP.md — public copy reader-check
reviewer_role: independent reader-check (anti-self-cert; reviewers did not write the copy)

ai_tells: 'The bot writes it down. A person checks it. The record decides what comes next.' — triad reflex
Four repeated 'We move on from X only when Y' — templated rhythm
'What works now, what has to prove itself next.' — antithesis scaffolding
'The bot writes it down. A person checks it. The record decides what comes next.' — triad reflex
'keep the working lane narrow, prove it, then widen.' — templated triad
'starting with the communities already here, not a big-bang launch' — antithesis scaffolding
codex.overclaim: 'NEWS will carry weekly changes.' — promises a weekly cadence the evidence does not establish.
codex.one_fix: Replace internal proof-system language with plain community terms.

triade_outcome.verdict: BLOCK (Codex block holds; a single independent block holds the whole sign-off per triade_signoff.md)
triade_outcome.convergence: Strong. Both legs independently flagged the same jargon leaks (shadow CPI score, row-backed records, decision ledger, hardening) and the same AI tells (the 3-clause 'bot writes it down' triad, the repeated 'We move on from X only when Y' templated rhythm, antithesis scaffolding). Codex additionally caught an overclaim: 'NEWS will carry weekly changes' promises a cadence not yet real.

jargon_to_plain.row-backed records: real records / records that actually exist
jargon_to_plain.hardening / gated by hardening: stability checks / still being tested for reliability

ai_tells_to_break: 'The bot writes it down. A person checks it. The record decides what comes next.' -> break the 3-clause triad into two uneven sentences
The four 'We move on from X only when Y' lines -> vary the shape; not four identical templates
'What works now, what has to prove itself next.' + 'not a big-bang launch' -> drop the antithesis seesaw
'keep the working lane narrow, prove it, then widen.' -> de-triad
required_fixes.overclaim_to_cut: 'NEWS will carry weekly changes/updates' -> 'NEWS will carry updates' (drop the weekly cadence promise until it is real)

triade_outcome.human_leg: operator decides; can downgrade/block, cannot bless the jargon as clear
triade_outcome.lesson: Manual copy build re-introduced the exact jargon + AI-tell contamination the session built the copy gate to stop. This is direct evidence FOR the deferred Layer 1 word-catcher linter: Water Prompt test 6 is written but not mechanically enforced, so the writer optimized past it again.
